title: Provider Resources
text:
cember 18, 2020)
A Guide for Taking a Sexual History – This booklet provides guidance on how to discuss sexual health issues with patients.
Drug and Diagnostic Test Shortages – Up-to-date information about national drug shortages and diagnostic testing kits.
Considerations for the Implementation of Point of Care (POC) Tests for Syphilis – This document addresses the challenges in diagnosing and treating syphilis, discussing the implementation of POC tests to facilitate rapid diagnosis and treatment during the same visit. (June 2024)
The Diagnosis, Management and Prevention of Syphilis: An Update and Review – Clinical guidance for diagnosing and managing syphilis. This document reflects content from the 2015 CDC STD Treatment Guidelines. This is a product of the NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene Bureau of Sexually Transmitted Infections and the NYC STD Prevention Training Center. (March 2019)
Prenatal Syphilis Screening Laws by State – Outlines state statutory and regulatory language regarding prenatal syphilis screening in the United States.
Expedited Partner Therapy – Information, guidance, and resources to effective treat and manage patients diagnosed with an STD and their sex partner(s).
STD Clinical Slides – STI clinical slides depicting disease manifestations and laboratory images of the organism.
Last Reviewed: December
